node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"անընդունելի","line":{"facs":"#z104249336","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104249336","n":"15"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-106a"},"n":"անընդունելի"},"M8375":{"lit":"անընդունելի","line":{"facs":"#z104094499","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104094499","n":"20"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8375.0090"},"n":"անընդունելի"},"M691":{"lit":"ան<abbr><g ref=\"#und\">ընդ<\/g><\/abbr><lb xml:id=\"l104013866\" facs=\"#z104013866\" n=\"6\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ունելի","line":{"facs":"#z104013865","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104013865","n":"5"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"691-146b"},"n":"անընդունելի"},"M7032":{"lit":"ան<abbr><g ref=\"#und\">ընդ<\/g><\/abbr>ունելի","line":{"facs":"#z104007114","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104007114","n":"21"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7032-083a"},"n":"անընդունելի"},"M695":{"lit":"անընդունե<lb xml:id=\"l103924975\" facs=\"#z103924975\" n=\"1\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>լի","line":{"facs":"#z103925045","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l103925045","n":"17"},"column":{"n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"695-360b"},"n":"անընդունելի"},"M9307":{"lit":"անընդունելի","line":{"facs":"#z104217404","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104217404","n":"8"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9307-155b"},"n":"անընդունելի"}}
